g.text: 1. IGN_LS(n) = CYLINDER(n). Firmware handles firing order.
2. LS3 firing order: 1-8-7-2-6-5-4-3 (in firmware, NOT wiring).
3. All 8 D510C coils mount on DEL-Stributor bracket,
4. Coil IC signal wires are ~2.5ft (firewall grommet to bracket).
5. Coil B+ power bus: 16AWG from PDM30 dedicated output.
6. Coil ground bus: 16AWG to engine block/chassis ground stud.
7. Each D510C has 4 pins: B+(C), IGN(A), GND(D), HV-spark(B).
8. Only the IGN (IC signal) wire is individual per coil.
B+, GND are bussed on the bracket. HV goes to spark plug.
9. Injectors: 18AWG, peak-and-hold from M130 INJ_PH outputs.
4 per side on standard LS3 fuel rails, EV6/USCAR connectors.
WIRE PIN FUNCTION AWG COLOR LEN
- Old: coils spread across valve covers
- New: all 8 coils in single DEL-Stributor bracket
Pin A = IC signal (individual, from M130 IGN_LS)
Pin B = Low reference (bussed to sensor ground)
Pin C = B+ power (bussed 16AWG from PDM30)
Pin D = Chassis ground (bussed 16AWG to block)
Peak-and-hold drive from M130 INJ_PH outputs
Injector ground returns internally via M130
DWG: NKW-K5-02-1 | REV: v2 | 2026-04-04 | MOTEC M130 GPR-LS3
16 wires (8 IGN + 8 INJ) | Coils: DEL-Stributor central mount
